responses.title: Welcome Greeting
responses.content: Hello! Thank you for reaching out to ZenithDesk support. I've received your inquiry and I'm looking into it right now. How can I best assist you today?

responses.title: More Info Needed
responses.content: To help you faster, could you please provide more details about the issue? Specifically, any error messages you saw or steps to reproduce the behavior would be very helpful.

responses.title: Issue Resolved
responses.content: I'm glad we could get that sorted out for you! If you have any other questions, feel free to open a new ticket. Have a great day!

responses.title: Escalating Ticket
responses.content: I'm escalating this ticket to our senior technical team for a deeper investigation. They will get back to you with an update shortly. Thank you for your patience.
